title: Specialized Biomedical Trial Registry
design: Early arbitrary professional-domain fact ledger, distractor report, late retrieval audit. Long version. Audit starts around 11k tokens for future large-context runs.

title: Specialized Biomedical Trial Registry
design: Early arbitrary professional-domain fact ledger, distractor report, late retrieval audit. Compact version. Audit starts around 2k tokens so 4k-token full-forward checks include retrieval answers.

title: Specialized Biomedical Trial Registry
design: Early arbitrary professional-domain fact ledger, distractor report, late retrieval audit. Hard compact version. Answers are unique random nonce strings, so late audit tokens require exact long-range copying.
